Hydra Max

I got tired of buying supplements I would never finish. So I built the one I actually kept using.

Hydration that actually works
when everything else changes.

Eat less. Hydrate the same. Feel worse.

That is not random. When your diet changes, your fluid intake, electrolyte balance, digestion, and energy can shift with it.

Hydra Max was built to be the daily foundation: potassium-forward electrolytes, clean focus support, bee-derived compounds, and gentle gut support in one simple morning drink.

Built From Experience

Not marketing.
Real life.

I built Hydra Max because I needed something better.

During my own transformation, I kept running into the same problem. Most hydration products were loaded with sugar, built around caffeine, overloaded with sodium, or too weak to notice.

My background in beekeeping led me to bee pollen and propolis. From there, the formula kept getting refined around what actually made sense: potassium, magnesium, taurine, tyrosine, theanine, MCT, and digestive support that could fit into a real daily routine.

The result is what I wanted from the beginning: a morning drink that earns its place.

What Makes It Different

The basics,
done seriously.

  • Potassium-forward instead of sodium-heavy.
  • No stimulant dependency just to feel like it is doing something.
  • Bee pollen and propolis included for a real reason, not a cute label story.
  • Gut support included because hydration and digestion are connected in real life.
  • No proprietary blends. Every meaningful ingredient is shown clearly.
A better morning starts with giving your body something useful.
The Formula

Every ingredient has
a job.

No fairy dusting. No mystery blends. No "kitchen sink" formula.

Hydra Max is built around practical daily support: hydration, focus, cellular support, and digestive comfort.

The lead electrolyte in the formula. Potassium supports fluid balance and is often underrepresented in daily hydration products.

A clean, non-stimulant focus support ingredient for long mornings, busy days, and staying mentally present.
Calm Clarity

Supports a smoother feel alongside tyrosine. Focus without trying to turn your hydration drink into a pre-workout.
Cellular Support

Included for cellular hydration and overall daily performance support.

A light daily fuel source that fits the formula without relying on sugar.
Bee-Derived

A nod to where this brand started, but only because they earned their place in the formula.
Gut Support
Ginger, Fennel & Lemon Balm
200mg · 150mg · 100mg
Gentle digestive support built into the daily foundation, because feeling hydrated should not come with feeling heavy.

Who It Is For

For people who are done
settling for "fine."

  • People on GLP-1s whose appetite, food intake, and hydration habits have changed.
  • People cutting weight who need a daily hydration routine that actually supports the process.
  • Busy adults who want focus and hydration without leaning on another energy drink.
  • Anyone tired of sodium-heavy electrolyte products that feel more like hype than help.
  • People building a real routine and wanting one simple thing they can do every morning.

replenish-recovery-hydration-thryve.title: Replenish — Recovery Hydration
replenish-recovery-hydration-thryve.html:
Replenish — Recovery Hydration

Most hydration products are built for the middle of your effort. Replenish is built for after.

Restore what
effort actually
takes from you.

When the workout ends, the sauna cools, or the heat breaks — that is when the real replenishment work begins. Your body is not just low on water. It is depleted at the electrolyte level, and plain water can actually slow recovery by diluting what is left.

Replenish is built to restore what sweat, heat, and exertion actually take. Sodium at 800mg from two sources. Potassium at 400mg. Magnesium from Malate and Glycinate for better tolerance. Taurine at 1500mg for osmotic balance. And Betaine Anhydrous at 1250mg because cellular hydration is a separate mechanism from electrolyte replacement — and both matter after real effort.

Add Replenish to Cart ↑ See the Formula
25
Servings per pouch
800mg
Sodium, dual source
1500mg
Taurine per serving
$1.80
Per serving, free shipping
Not designed for
Casual daily sipping Sports drink replacement Intra-workout hydration
When To Use It

Built for after.
Not during.

Replenish has a specific job. It is designed for the recovery window — the period after hard output when your body needs real replenishment, not just fluid.

Post-workout. Post-sauna. After long days in the heat. Heavy sweat restoration. That is where this formula earns its place.

One job. Done right.

What Makes It Different

Real recovery.
Not a flavored salt packet.

  • Dual-source sodium from Sodium Citrate and Sodium Chloride for full-spectrum repletion.
  • Magnesium Malate and Glycinate for better tolerance and bioavailability.
  • Betaine Anhydrous at 1250mg for cellular hydration — a mechanism plain electrolytes miss.
  • No syrupy texture. No heavy sweetness. No engineered sports-drink feel.
  • No proprietary blends. Every ingredient and dose is shown.
How To Use It

One scoop.
After the work.

🏋️
Post-Workout
Mix one scoop with 12–16oz of water immediately after training. Your recovery window opens the moment you stop.
🧖
Post-Sauna
Heat sessions deplete electrolytes faster than most people account for. One scoop after sauna replaces what the heat took.
☀️
Heat & Heavy Sweat
Long days outside, physical labor, high-heat environments. Any situation where sweat loss is significant.
The Formula

Every ingredient
earns its place.

No proprietary blends. No underdosed decoration. Replenish is built around five active jobs: sodium repletion, potassium restoration, magnesium support, osmotic balance, and cellular hydration.

Electrolytes — Sodium
Sodium Citrate + Sodium Chloride
~800mg sodium per serving
Dual-source system. Sodium Citrate for smoother absorption and palatability. Sodium Chloride for direct sweat replacement. Together they cover more of what heavy effort actually depletes.
Electrolytes — Potassium
Potassium Citrate
400mg per serving
Supports intracellular hydration, muscle function, and electrolyte balance. Potassium is the intracellular partner to sodium's extracellular role — both matter for complete recovery.
Electrolytes — Magnesium
Magnesium Malate + Glycinate
~165–175mg per serving
Two forms chosen for tolerability and bioavailability. Malate for muscle recovery support. Glycinate for smoother absorption. Moderated for daily use without digestive discomfort.
Osmotic Balance
Taurine
1500mg per serving
Taurine supports osmotic balance and cellular hydration at the fluid regulation level. At 1500mg it is a working dose, not a label decoration.
Cellular Hydration
Betaine Anhydrous (TMG)
1250mg per serving
An osmolyte that supports cellular hydration through a separate mechanism from electrolytes. Particularly relevant under heat and physical stress. Included because complete recovery requires both pathways.
Functional Base
Coconut Water Powder
500mg per serving
A natural source of additional potassium and trace minerals. Adds to the electrolyte profile while supporting the smooth, balanced drinkability of the formula.
Add Replenish to Cart ↑
The Flavor

Bright. Smooth.
Recovery-oriented.

Peach Pineapple Lime. Designed to feel bright and refreshing without being candy-like, syrupy, or aggressively tart. Three layers built to complement the formula — not fight it.

Pineapple
Tropical brightness · Natural acidity · Smooth body
Peach
Rounded sweetness · Smooth finish · Balances citrus
Layered Lime
Soft citrus base · Bright top note · No acid harshness

Sweetened with Allulose only. No monk fruit. No artificial edge. Clean finish designed to feel like real recovery support — not a flavored salt packet.

Who It Is For

For anyone who
earns their recovery.

  • People who train hard and want recovery hydration that matches the effort.
  • Regular sauna users who know heat depletion is real and under-addressed.
  • People working in heat — physical labor, outdoor work, high-heat environments.
  • Hydra Max users ready to add a dedicated recovery layer to their stack.
  • Anyone who has felt the difference between drinking water after effort and actually replenishing.
Stack It

Hydra Max before.
Replenish after.

Two formulas. One complete hydration protocol. Hydra Max supports your daily hydration foundation and keeps you sharp through your effort. Replenish closes the recovery loop when the work is done.

Different jobs. Different formulas. Built to work together.
